prompt:
Use case: historical-scene
Asset type: 3×1 character pose sheet for a layered Chinese paper-collage animation
Input images: Image 1 is the approved creek style sample; preserve the elderly woman on its right as the exact identity, lined calm face, gray wrapped hair, muted ochre-brown layered robe and paper-collage construction
Primary request: three complete poses of the same elderly woman, one per equal horizontal cell: 1 seated low and steadily grinding a thick iron pestle across an implied stone, both hands and full pestle visible; 2 seated upright, looking up calmly while answering, one hand resting near the iron pestle; 3 seated low in a stronger side-view grinding pose for rhythmic repetition
Style/medium: premium handcrafted Chinese paper collage matching Image 1, torn fibrous edges, restrained ink, matte mineral pigments and subtle paper shadows
Composition/framing: exact 3 columns × 1 row, consistent identity and scale, generous padding, no overlap, all heads, hands, feet and iron pestles complete
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background in every cell; no grindstone, floor, cast shadow, gradient, texture or divider
Constraints: thick iron pestle remains a pestle, not a finished needle; no text, labels, watermark, logo, extra people, modern items or #ff00ff in subject; stable anatomy
Avoid: witch caricature, comedy, anime, chibi, photorealism, glossy 3D, cropped hands, warped pestle, identity drift
